articles.title: Saudi-led coalition in Yemen says it will respond to Houthis threats to ships with force
articles.summary: Saudi-led coalition in Yemen says it will respond to Houthis threats to ships with force The Saudi-led coalition in Yemen said on Monday that it will respond to Houthis threats to ships with "force" after the Yemeni group declared a naval blockade on the kingdom. The coalition said in a statement it has began to implement safety measures for its ships passing through Bab el-Mandeb Strait. articles.title: US Centcom says it has launched new round of strikes on Iran
articles.summary: US Centcom says it has launched new round of strikes on Iran The US military announced on Monday that it has began a new round of strikes against Iran. "The strikes are designed to further degrade Iranian military capabilities used to attack commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz," US Central Command (Centcom) wrote in a post to X. Today at 4 p.m. ET, U.S. forces began a new round of strikes against Iran at the Commander in Chief's direction. articles.summary: IRGC says US missile intercepted over Kerman, explosions heard near Sirik A US cruise missile has been intercepted over Rudbar-e-Jonubi, in Iran’s central Kerman province, according to a statement from Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, carried by Fars news agency. articles.summary: Trump: Netanyahu will not be arrested while in US Trump said in a social media post on Monday that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu “will not be arrested, in any way, shape, or form, while in the United States of America”.
